trackCharacteristics: Counter-clockwise 3.33 km circuit in Christchurch. 11 corners: 7 left, 4 right. Mix of hairpins, kinks, and sweepers. Technical back section with tight direction changes.
notableFeatures: Fast kinks at T1 and T5
Final hairpin left onto pit straight

corners.name: Turn 1 – Pit Straight End
corners.racingLineNotes: Flat-out kink, slight lift. Stay left of centre on entry.
corners.notes: Fast left kink at the end of the pit straight. Minimal steering input needed.

corners.name: Turn 2 – Open Left
corners.racingLineNotes: Open radius left, good vision through. Can carry speed.
corners.notes: Open left-hander, reasonably fast. Good visibility to exit.

corners.name: Turn 3 – Left
corners.racingLineNotes: Medium left, sets up approach to the hairpin.
corners.notes: Left corner leading into the hairpin approach.

corners.name: Turn 4 – Left Hairpin

visual_targets.apex: Inside left kerb at tightest point

corners.racingLineNotes: Heavy braking. Late apex to maximise exit speed onto the back section.
corners.notes: Slowest left-hand corner on the circuit. Critical to get exit right.

corners.name: Turn 5 – Kink Right
corners.racingLineNotes: Fast right kink, minimal input needed. Keep momentum.
corners.notes: Quick right kink on the back section. Flat-out or near flat-out.

corners.name: Turn 6 – Tight Right
corners.racingLineNotes: Hard braking into tight right. Good exit matters for the run to T7.

corners.name: Turn 7 – Sweeping Left
corners.racingLineNotes: Sweeping left, need to commit. Long arc — don't pinch the exit.
corners.notes: Fast sweeping left, requires commitment and smooth steering.

corners.name: Turn 8 – Long Right Hairpin

visual_targets.apex: Right inside kerb at tightest point

corners.racingLineNotes: Long right hairpin — late apex, patience through the slow section.
corners.notes: Long right-hand hairpin. Slowest part of the back section.

corners.name: Turn 9 – Tight Right
corners.racingLineNotes: Tight right, sets up approach to T10.
corners.notes: Tight right-hander in the complex before the final corner.

corners.name: Turn 10 – Tight Left

visual_targets.exit: Exit kerb, short straight to final corner

corners.racingLineNotes: Tight left, needs a good exit to carry speed to the final hairpin.
corners.notes: Tight left before the final corner. Exit speed is critical.

corners.name: Turn 11 – Final Hairpin Left

visual_targets.apex: Left inside kerb at tightest point

corners.racingLineNotes: Long left hairpin onto the pit straight. Late apex for best drive out.
corners.notes: Final left hairpin. Drive out onto the pit straight. Critical for lap time.
